summary: Results-driven software engineering lead with a decade of experience delivering robust solutions across fintech, marketing, logistics, and retail. Proficient in C#, SQL, JavaScript/TypeScript, and modern web technologies, with a proven track record of supporting mission-critical systems. Known for a strong work ethic, adaptability, and an ability to solve complex problems under pressure. Currently leading a team at FinChoice while pursuing a BSc in Information Technology.

experience.summary: Technical and people leadership for the team that maintains FinChoice's core financial systems.
highlights: Fulfil all Senior Software Engineer responsibilities while providing technical and people leadership to the team.
Administer and track team KPAs, ensuring alignment with business objectives and delivery standards.
Manage team leave planning and approvals to maintain delivery continuity.
Conduct technical and behavioural interviews, contributing to hiring decisions and team growth.
Facilitate and participate in Scrum ceremonies — stand-ups, sprint planning, reviews, and retrospectives.
Support the Project Manager during sprint planning by breaking down business requirements into clear, actionable Jira tickets with well-defined acceptance criteria.
Collaborate with other Engineering Leads to identify, prioritise, and resolve mission-critical system issues and production incidents.
Actively contribute to the Architecture Forum, providing input on system design, scalability, and long-term technical strategy.
Mentor and coach junior and intermediate engineers, supporting their technical development, code quality, and career growth.

experience.summary: Maintained the core lending and collections platform powering disbursements, collections, and month-end processing.
highlights: Maintain and enhance core financial systems using C#, SQL, Blazor, and MVC, ensuring high availability and performance for business-critical functions.
Serve as a key point of contact for FinOps and back-office teams, resolving technical issues and improving internal processes through automation.
Manage and support the internal platform used by the call centre, delivering reliable functionality for customer engagement and operations.
Develop and monitor SSIS packages and scheduled ETL jobs to support data integrity, financial reporting, and regulatory compliance.
Develop and manage microservices and real-time messaging solutions using RabbitMQ for efficient service communication.
Work across the full software lifecycle using Agile methodologies and DevOps best practices.

experience.summary: Built and shipped scalable features for the Dotdigital marketing automation platform — won the 2023 internal hackathon.
highlights: Leveraged C#, Angular, SQL, and BigQuery to build scalable and maintainable software solutions.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams and product managers to ensure successful project completion.
Built and maintained integrations and APIs for seamless data transfer between systems.
Implemented unit and integration tests to ensure software quality and maintainability.
Worked with Azure cloud platform and implemented CI/CD pipelines for smooth, timely software deployment.
Applied Agile methodologies to improve development and feature delivery.

experience.summary: Built internal systems across debtors, creditors, operations, mobile deliveries, customer service, and sales.
highlights: Developed and maintained internal systems for debtors, creditors, operations, mobile deliveries, customer service, and sales using C#, SQL, Ionic, and Angular.
Built integrations and APIs for seamless data transfer.
Implemented unit tests to ensure software quality and maintainability.
Collaborated with the architect and stakeholders to gather requirements and ensure successful project completions.

experience.summary: Delivered software solutions for retail clients — reports, ETL pipelines, and a Java debit-order gateway.
highlights: Developed and maintained software solutions for clients using C#, SQL, Java, SSIS, SSRS, and ASP.Net MVC.
Collaborated with Development Product Managers (DPM) and stakeholders to gather requirements, provide technical guidance, and ensure successful project completions.
Built, maintained, and documented ETL processes; wrote reports and implemented data warehouse solutions for clients.
Maintained a Java gateway application to process debit orders.
Worked on CI/CD deployment using Octopus Deploy to ensure timely software releases.
Participated in Agile and Scrum development methodologies.

experience.summary: Where it all started — first taste of professional engineering on retail clients' systems.
highlights: Assisted senior developers in developing software solutions for clients using C#, SQL, SSIS, SSRS, and ASP.Net MVC.
Gained experience in ETL processes, writing reports, and data warehousing solutions for clients.
Participated in Agile and Scrum development methodologies.

education.credential: N1 – N4 Certificate: Mechanical Engineering Studies

certifications.name: MCPD: Microsoft Certified Professional Developer
certifications.note: Includes all underlying MCTS component certifications.

awards.title: TransUnion Rising Star Awards
awards.description: Nominated in recognition of impact, growth, and contribution to the engineering function.

awards.title: Dotdigital Hackathon Champions — Most Needed Feature
awards.description: Built a 1st–3rd line support feature integrated into the back-office system of the main application. The solution significantly reduced the dependency on engineers for routine support tasks, saving valuable time for both the company and its customers.
